qa_pairs.question: Why is it important to use a tag or commit ID when installing a package from a remote repository?
qa_pairs.answer: It is important to use a tag (version) or commit ID to ensure a reproducible installation. Using the HEAD of the repository may cause issues later if authors make changes.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find tags or releases for a repository on GitHub?
qa_pairs.answer: On GitHub, you can find the tags or releases under the 'Releases' section on the right panel.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find more information about installing packages from a version control system (VCS)?
qa_pairs.answer: For more information on installing from a version control system (VCS), you can refer to the 'vcs-support' documentation on pip's website.
